name: stockyard-promptreplay
description: Full request/response logging for LLM APIs. Capture every prompt, completion, and token count. Replay past requests for debugging.

tools.name: promptreplay_list
tools.description: List recent logged LLM requests with timestamps, models, and costs.

tools.name: promptreplay_get
tools.description: Get full details of a logged request including prompt and response.

tools.name: promptreplay_replay
tools.description: Replay a previously logged LLM request.

tools.name: promptreplay_stats
tools.description: Get logging statistics: total entries, storage size, requests by model.

tools.name: promptreplay_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the PromptReplay proxy is running and healthy.
